lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.
The car is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and minor dents, and the interior shows moderate wear. It is currently operational but will require some maintenance.

Calling all DIY enthusiasts and restoration pros! This vehicle is ready for a complete transformation and offers a fantastic foundation for your next big project. While it currently needs significant mechanical attention and some TLC on the body, it’s a rare chance to bring a classic back to its former glory at a budget-friendly price!

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-maintained throughout its life. The exterior paint retains a strong shine, though there are minor stone chips on the front bumper and a few light surface scratches consistent with regular use. Inside, the cabin is clean and well-preserved, with only minor wear on the driver's seat bolster and carpets. Mechanically, the car performs reliably, with a smooth engine and responsive handling. All power features, including the infotainment system and climate control, are fully operational. This is a solid, dependable vehicle that offers a great balance of performance and value for its next owner.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant rust and major body damage. The interior is heavily worn with tears in the seats and stains. The engine requires major mechanical work and the car is not in drivable condition.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, truly representing a showroom-quality example. The exterior finish is flawless, with a deep luster and zero imperfections, scratches, or stone chips. It has been strictly garage-kept and professionally detailed. Inside, the cabin remains in like-new condition; the leather is supple with no signs of wear, and all electronic features and climate controls function exactly as they did the day it left the factory. Mechanically, the car is perfect, backed by a complete and documented service history. A buyer can expect a vehicle that looks, smells, and drives like a brand-new car, suitable for the most discerning collector.

Presenting a peerless example of automotive excellence. This vehicle has been maintained to an exacting standard, preserved in a state that reflects its original showroom delivery. Every surface, mechanical component, and electronic system operates with absolute precision. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast to acquire a specimen of uncompromising quality and provenance.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy. Honestly, this car is in such incredible shape—it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been pampered since day one and kept in a climate-controlled garage. You won’t find a single scratch or dent on this beauty. I’m really sad to see it go, but I’d love for it to go to a home where it’ll be just as loved. Feel free to reach out with any questions or come take a look in person—you won’t be disappointed!

Offered is an exceptional E92 M3, a pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering featuring the legendary S65 V8. This specimen boasts a surgical maintenance history, including preventative rod bearing replacement using lead-free treated shells and ARP bolts. The 6-speed longitudinal transmission shifts with mechanical precision, synchronized perfectly with the variable M differential lock for optimal power delivery. The factory-correct suspension maintains its Electronic Damper Control (EDC) integrity, ensuring cornering flat-out with zero bushing deflection. With an immaculate undercarriage and a paint finish showing no swirl marks or oxidation, this vehicle represents a turnkey acquisition for the discerning collector seeking peak atmospheric performance.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Clean title. Full service history.

Experience the pinnacle of automotive preservation with this showroom-quality masterpiece. This vehicle presents in an absolutely flawless state, boasting a mirror-like factory finish and an interior that still carries its original new-car aroma. Every body panel is laser-straight, and the premium leather upholstery remains supple and uncreased, appearing as if it just rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive, fully documented service history and a drive that is both silent and powerful. No detail has been overlooked—from the pristine, dust-free engine bay to the untouched alloy wheels. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a vehicle that truly defies its age and stands as a testament to meticulous, climate-controlled care.

Presenting a peerless example of automotive excellence, this vehicle is offered in impeccable, showroom-grade condition. Meticulously preserved and showing no signs of wear, it represents the pinnacle of its class. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine asset that meets the most exacting standards of quality and performance.

We are pleased to present this impeccably preserved vehicle, maintained to a standard indistinguishable from its original showroom delivery. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring a flawless exterior and a pristine interior that reflects an uncompromising commitment to automotive excellence. Meticulously inspected and prepared for the most discerning collector, this offering stands as a definitive example of superior preservation and peak performance.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, it’s in incredible shape. It’s been pampered since day one, always garage-kept, and looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! You won't find a single scratch or dent—it really is a dream to drive. I'm looking for a new home for it where it'll be just as loved. Feel free to reach out if you want to come see this beauty in person!

This 997-generation Carrera S is a definitive example of analog precision. The 3.8L flat-six engine remains in peak mechanical health, exhibiting robust compression across all cylinders and a pristine bore-scope verification. Power is transmitted through a precise 6-speed longitudinal manual gearbox with a factory short-shift kit, ensuring immediate throttle response and tactile engagement. The PASM (Porsche Active Suspension Management) system has been meticulously maintained, providing a flat cornering attitude without compromising damping compliance. All factory VIN tags are present, and the original paint demonstrates exceptional depth with no evidence of oxidation or clear-coat failure. The undercarriage is remarkably dry, showing zero seepage from the rear main seal or spark plug tubes. This is a turn-key, investment-grade
Mint condition. Flawless interior and exterior. Zero mechanical issues. Clean title. Full maintenance records included.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that defines the 'mint' standard in every sense. This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, appearing as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, completely free of rock chips, swirl marks, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of luxury; the premium leather upholstery is taut and supple with no signs of wear, and the high-tech dashboard remains in flawless condition. Every feature, from the panoramic sunroof to the advanced driver-assistance systems, operates with precision. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach, boasting a full, documented service history with all maintenance performed ahead of schedule by certified specialists. The engine bay is spotless, and the undercarriage reflects the car's sheltered life. It sits on pristine alloy wheels with brand-new, high-performance tires. For the discerning buyer who demands perfection and a turn-key experience, this is the ultimate find.

Presenting an exceptional vehicle maintained to an uncompromising standard. This specimen exhibits showroom-quality aesthetics and mechanical precision, representing the pinnacle of its class. Meticulously preserved and free of any discernable wear, it offers the discerning buyer a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine example of automotive excellence.

We are pleased to present this impeccably preserved specimen, representing the pinnacle of its class. Maintained to an exacting standard, this vehicle exhibits no discernible wear, retaining its original showroom luster both aesthetically and mechanically. Every surface reflects meticulous stewardship, and the comprehensive service history confirms its status as a collector-grade acquisition. For the discerning buyer seeking a definitive example of engineering excellence, this offering remains unparalleled in the current market.

Hey everyone! I'm honestly so sad to see this beauty go, but it's time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely pristine, mint condition—it basically looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I've babied it since day one, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you're looking for something that's been loved and cared for perfectly, this is the one! Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

This E46 M3 represents a pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, featuring the legendary S54B32 power unit. The valvetrain is meticulously adjusted, with a comprehensive VANOS overhaul ensuring optimal cam phasing across the rev range. Mechanical integrity is paramount; the rear subframe has been proactively reinforced, and rod bearings have been replaced with high-tolerance components. The chassis remains taut, utilizing OEM
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint. Interior flawless. Mechanically perfect. Inspection reports available.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that redefines the standard for 'mint' condition. This car has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage and looks exactly as it did the day it rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero swirl marks, chips, or imperfections, complemented by pristine alloy wheels wrapped in premium tires. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary; the high-grade leather upholstery remains supple and free of any wear, still carrying that subtle new-car aroma. Every electronic feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, with a full documented service history from authorized dealerships and a smooth, powerful performance that feels brand new. This sale includes all original keys,

Presenting an automotive specimen of peerless distinction. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom-grade condition, having been maintained to the most exacting standards. With its flawless exterior finish and a cabin that retains its original factory luster, this offering represents the pinnacle of its class. Every mechanical and aesthetic detail has been scrutinized to ensure uncompromising performance and aesthetic integrity.

We are privileged to present this exceptional vehicle, an uncompromising specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This motorcar remains in pristine condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original showroom elegance. Meticulously serviced and stored in a climate-controlled environment, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a truly peerless example of engineering excellence. We invite serious inquiries for this investment-grade acquisition.

Hey there! You have seriously got to see this absolute beauty! It’s in truly incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives just like it did the day it was first bought. I’ve babied this car since day one, keeping it spotless and perfectly maintained. It’s a total dream on the road, and I’m only letting it go because I need something a bit bigger. If you’re looking for a ride that’s practically brand new, this is definitely the one for you! Let's get you behind the wheel!

This specimen features the legendary 2JZ-GTE power plant, maintaining factory-spec boost pressures through its sequential twin-turbochargers. The Getrag V160 6-speed manual transmission provides crisp engagement, feeding power to a Torsen limited-slip differential. The chassis retains its original torsional rigidity, with the double-wishbone suspension components showing zero fatigue. Every fluid line, gasket, and heat shield is in showroom condition, ensuring optimal thermal management and peak volumetric efficiency. This is a true survivor, free of any aftermarket modifications, preserving the balanced handling
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Maintenance up to date. Ready for sale.

This vehicle is a true 'time capsule' example, presenting in showroom condition that must be seen to be fully appreciated. Meticulously kept in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior retains its original factory luster with a mirror-like finish, free of any swirl marks, stone chips, or door dings. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the premium leather upholstery remains taut with no bolster wear, and the interior still carries that distinct new-car scent. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced climate control, functions exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, boasting a documented service history with all maintenance performed exclusively by certified technicians. The undercarriage is remarkably clean, reflecting its life of pampered ownership and fair-weather driving only. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who accepts nothing less than perfection, this is a rare opportunity to own a flawless piece of automotive history.

Presenting an unparalleled opportunity to acquire a vehicle in truly pristine, showroom condition. This specimen has been meticulously maintained to the highest standards, exhibiting no discernible wear or mechanical compromise. Every aspect of this automobile reflects a commitment to excellence, from its flawless exterior finish to its immaculate interior appointments. For the discerning buyer seeking a collector-grade vehicle, this offering represents the pinnacle of its class.
